reviews.review_description:
10/10 best file manager, way better than the Quest's built in one. It also allows you to do everything you can normally with Android's built in file manager. Wonderful app, but I'm really surprised that Meta actually allowed you to upload this. Not complaining at all though. 

Unlike the quests built in file manager, It supports all file types and also allows you to install android apps.

The dev is a star! Please check out his Quest Games Optimizer app which for a very reasonable price makes games look much better. This file manager app is amazing, please Meta don't take it down, we really need an app of this sort, think of your users who are your customers.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your kind words

reviews.review_title: The app that solves all your problems
reviews.review_description:
Finally, the app that solves all your problems simply.
Download QGO and all the APKs you want, without even having to tinker or be in dev mode!
10 stars out of 5 ;)

If you play TAVR and use the LIV creator kit then it will send videos to the final manager only and the file manager overcomplicates the system to send it to mobile or share so much that you can't. There's a reason meta didn't add this to their headers
I said something about this not being original but the developer answered and said a pretty good point.

developer_response.body: Hello, you can read in the description of the app the following: "Access the native Android file manager on your Meta Quest". So yes, the app simply opens the native file manager. Also don't get me wrong, the app is free. So here is just a simple and free way to open this hidden feature. Nothing more
